Character and string utilities, constants, and functions for Unicode, ASCII, and ECMAScript in JerryScript.


## Files
- **[lit-char-helpers.c](lit-char-helpers.c.md)**: Character utility functions for checking and converting Unicode and ASCII characters in JavaScript.
- **[lit-char-helpers.h](lit-char-helpers.h.md)**: Defines character constants and functions for character classification and manipulation in ECMAScript.
- **[lit-globals.h](lit-globals.h.md)**: Defines data types and constants for handling ECMAScript strings and Unicode encoding in JerryScript.
- **[lit-magic-strings.c](lit-magic-strings.c.md)**: Functions for managing and comparing magic strings and external magic strings in UTF-8 format.
- **[lit-magic-strings.h](lit-magic-strings.h.md)**: Defines and manages magic string constants and their operations for the JerryScript engine.
- **[lit-magic-strings.inc.h](lit-magic-strings.inc.h.md)**: Defines a list of ECMA magic strings for use in the JerryScript engine.
- **[lit-strings.c](lit-strings.c.md)**: Functions for validating, converting, and comparing UTF-8 and CESU-8 encoded strings, including handling surrogate pairs.
- **[lit-strings.h](lit-strings.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for UTF-8 and UTF-16 string manipulation and validation.
- **[lit-unicode-ranges.inc.h](lit-unicode-ranges.inc.h.md)**: Defines Unicode character ranges and specific characters for letters, non-letter identifier parts, and separators.
